        "# Importamos las bibliotecas necesarias\n",
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import numpy as np\n",
        "import pandas_datareader.data as web\n",
        "from datetime import datetime\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "from sklearn.model_selection import train_test_split, KFold\n",
        "from sklearn.linear_model import LogisticRegression\n",
        "from sklearn.metrics import accuracy_score, confusion_matrix, classification_report\n",
        "from sklearn.preprocessing import StandardScaler\n",
        "import seaborn as sns\n",
        "import warnings\n",
        "warnings.filterwarnings(\"ignore\")"

      "source": [
        "# Definimos el período de tiempo para los datos\n",
        "start = datetime(1970, 1, 1)\n",
        "end = datetime(2019, 12, 31)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Descargamos los datos de FRED\n",
        "# Variables económicas comúnmente usadas en la literatura para predecir recesiones:\n",
        "try:\n",
        "    # Yield Curve (10Y - 3M)\n",
        "    treasury_10y = web.DataReader('DGS10', 'fred', start, end)\n",
        "    treasury_3m = web.DataReader('DTB3', 'fred', start, end)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Indicadores económicos principales\n",
        "    unemployment = web.DataReader('UNRATE', 'fred', start, end)  # Tasa de desempleo\n",
        "    industrial_prod = web.DataReader('INDPRO', 'fred', start, end)  # Producción industrial\n",
        "    cpi = web.DataReader('CPIAUCSL', 'fred', start, end)  # Índice de precios al consumidor\n",
        "    m2 = web.DataReader('M2SL', 'fred', start, end)  # Oferta monetaria M2\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Indicador de recesión (variable dependiente)\n",
        "    recession = web.DataReader('USREC', 'fred', start, end)\n",
        "\n",
        "except Exception as e:\n",
        "    print(f\"Error al descargar datos: {e}\")\n",
        "\n",
        "# Preparación de datos\n",
        "def prepare_data():\n",
        "    # Combinamos todos los datos en un solo DataFrame\n",
        "    data = pd.concat([\n",
        "        treasury_10y,\n",
        "        treasury_3m,\n",
        "        unemployment,\n",
        "        industrial_prod,\n",
        "        cpi,\n",
        "        m2,\n",
        "        recession\n",
        "    ], axis=1)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Nombramos las columnas\n",
        "    data.columns = ['T10Y', 'T3M', 'UNEMP', 'INDPRO', 'CPI', 'M2', 'RECESSION']\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Calculamos la yield curve\n",
        "    data['YIELD_CURVE'] = data['T10Y'] - data['T3M']\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Calculamos cambios porcentuales para algunas variables\n",
        "    for col in ['INDPRO', 'CPI', 'M2']:\n",
        "        data[f'{col}_CHG'] = data[col].pct_change(12)  # Cambio anual\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Eliminamos las columnas originales que no usaremos\n",
        "    data = data.drop(['T10Y', 'T3M', 'INDPRO', 'CPI', 'M2'], axis=1)\n",
        "\n",
        "    # Eliminamos los valores NaN\n",
        "    data = data.dropna()\n",
        "\n",
        "    return data"
      ]
    },

      "source": [
        "# Preparamos los datos\n",
        "data = prepare_data()\n",
        "\n",
        "# Separamos features (X) y target (y)\n",
        "X = data.drop('RECESSION', axis=1)\n",
        "y = data['RECESSION']\n",
        "\n",
        "# Escalamos los features\n",
        "scaler = StandardScaler()\n",
        "X_scaled = scaler.fit_transform(X)\n",
        "\n",
        "# K-Fold Cross Validation\n",
        "kf = KFold(n_splits=5, shuffle=True, random_state=42)\n",
        "accuracies = []\n",
        "model = LogisticRegression(random_state=42)\n",
        "\n",
        "for train_index, test_index in kf.split(X_scaled):\n",
        "    X_train, X_test = X_scaled[train_index], X_scaled[test_index]\n",
        "    y_train, y_test = y.iloc[train_index], y.iloc[test_index]\n",
        "\n",
        "    model.fit(X_train, y_train)\n",
        "    y_pred = model.predict(X_test)\n",
        "    accuracies.append(accuracy_score(y_test, y_pred))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Entrenamiento final del modelo con todos los datos\n",
        "model.fit(X_scaled, y)\n",
        "\n",
        "# Visualización de resultados\n",
        "plt.figure(figsize=(15, 5))\n",
        "\n",
        "# Gráfico 1: Precisión del modelo en cada fold\n",
        "plt.subplot(1, 2, 1)\n",
        "plt.bar(range(1, 6), accuracies)\n",
        "plt.title('Precisión por Fold')\n",
        "plt.xlabel('Fold')\n",
        "plt.ylabel('Precisión')\n",
        "\n",
        "# Gráfico 2: Importancia de las variables\n",
        "plt.subplot(1, 2, 2)\n",
        "feature_importance = pd.DataFrame({\n",
        "    'feature': X.columns,\n",
        "    'importance': abs(model.coef_[0])\n",
        "})\n",
        "sns.barplot(data=feature_importance, x='importance', y='feature')\n",
        "plt.title('Importancia de Variables')\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ]
    },

        "# 1. Gráfico de series temporales con períodos de recesión sombreados\n",
        "def plot_time_series_with_recession(data):\n",
        "    variables = [col for col in data.columns if col != 'RECESSION']\n",
        "\n",
        "    fig, axes = plt.subplots(len(variables), 1, figsize=(15, 4*len(variables)))\n",
        "    fig.suptitle('Variables Económicas y Períodos de Recesión', fontsize=16)\n",
        "\n",
        "    for i, var in enumerate(variables):\n",
        "        axes[i].plot(data.index, data[var], label=var)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Sombreamos las áreas de recesión\n",
        "        recession_periods = []\n",
        "        start = None\n",
        "        for date, value in data['RECESSION'].items():\n",
        "            if value == 1 and start is None:\n",
        "                start = date\n",
        "            elif value == 0 and start is not None:\n",
        "                recession_periods.append((start, date))\n",
        "                start = None\n",
        "\n",
        "        for start, end in recession_periods:\n",
        "            axes[i].axvspan(start, end, color='gray', alpha=0.2)\n",
        "\n",
        "        axes[i].set_title(f'Serie temporal de {var}')\n",
        "        axes[i].legend()\n",
        "        axes[i].grid(True)\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 2. Matriz de correlación\n",
        "def plot_correlation_matrix(data):\n",
        "    plt.figure(figsize=(12, 8))\n",
        "    correlation_matrix = data.corr()\n",
        "    sns.heatmap(correlation_matrix, annot=True, cmap='coolwarm', center=0)\n",
        "    plt.title('Matriz de Correlación entre Variables')\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 3. Distribución de variables durante recesiones vs no recesiones\n",
        "def plot_distributions(data):\n",
        "    variables = [col for col in data.columns if col != 'RECESSION']\n",
        "\n",
        "    fig, axes = plt.subplots(len(variables), 2, figsize=(15, 4*len(variables)))\n",
        "    fig.suptitle('Distribución de Variables: Recesión vs No Recesión', fontsize=16)\n",
        "\n",
        "    for i, var in enumerate(variables):\n",
        "        # Histograma\n",
        "        sns.histplot(data=data, x=var, hue='RECESSION', ax=axes[i,0])\n",
        "        axes[i,0].set_title(f'Histograma de {var}')\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Box plot\n",
        "        sns.boxplot(data=data, x='RECESSION', y=var, ax=axes[i,1])\n",
        "        axes[i,1].set_title(f'Box Plot de {var}')\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 4. Tabla de estadísticas descriptivas por período\n",
        "def print_descriptive_stats(data):\n",
        "    # Estadísticas durante recesiones\n",
        "    recession_stats = data[data['RECESSION'] == 1].describe()\n",
        "    no_recession_stats = data[data['RECESSION'] == 0].describe()\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\"\\nEstadísticas Descriptivas durante Recesiones:\")\n",
        "    print(recession_stats)\n",
        "    print(\"\\nEstadísticas Descriptivas durante Períodos sin Recesión:\")\n",
        "    print(no_recession_stats)\n",
        "\n",
        "# 5. Análisis de rezagos (lead-lag analysis)\n",
        "def plot_lag_analysis(data):\n",
        "    variables = [col for col in data.columns if col != 'RECESSION']\n",
        "\n",
        "    fig, axes = plt.subplots(len(variables), 1, figsize=(15, 4*len(variables)))\n",
        "    fig.suptitle('Análisis de Rezagos con Respecto a Recesiones', fontsize=16)\n",
        "\n",
        "    for i, var in enumerate(variables):\n",
        "        correlations = [data[var].corr(data['RECESSION'].shift(-k))\n",
        "                       for k in range(-12, 13)]\n",
        "\n",
        "        axes[i].plot(range(-12, 13), correlations)\n",
        "        axes[i].axvline(x=0, color='r', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3)\n",
        "        axes[i].set_title(f'Correlación de {var} con Recesiones')\n",
        "        axes[i].set_xlabel('Rezago (meses)')\n",
        "        axes[i].set_ylabel('Correlación')\n",
        "        axes[i].grid(True)\n",
        "\n",
        "    plt.tight_layout()\n",
        "    plt.show()\n",
        "\n",
        "# 6. Tabla de probabilidades condicionales\n",
        "def print_conditional_probabilities(data):\n",
        "    variables = [col for col in data.columns if col != 'RECESSION']\n",
        "\n",
        "    print(\"\\nProbabilidades Condicionales de Recesión:\")\n",
        "    for var in variables:\n",
        "        # Dividimos la variable en cuartiles\n",
        "        data[f'{var}_quartile'] = pd.qcut(data[var], q=4, labels=['Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4'])\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Calculamos probabilidad de recesión por cuartil\n",
        "        probs = data.groupby(f'{var}_quartile')['RECESSION'].mean()\n",
        "        print(f\"\\n{var}:\")\n",
        "        print(probs)\n",
        "\n",
        "        # Eliminamos la columna temporal\n",
        "        data = data.drop(f'{var}_quartile', axis=1)"
      ]
    },

        "# Predicción con valores específicos\n",
        "# Ejemplo de valores para predicción (deben estar en el mismo orden que las variables)\n",

        "ejemplo_scaled = scaler.transform(ejemplo_valores)\n",
